consent.title: We use cookies
consent.body: We use analytics cookies to understand how you use our site and improve your experience. You can accept or reject non-essential cookies.

meta.title: tendersbay — European tenders, awarded by your AI agents
meta.description: AI agents that hunt down the right European public tenders, demolish the paperwork, and walk your SME all the way to the award.

hero.titleLead: The tender they already counted as theirs?
hero.subtitle: A tender with your name on it closes tonight. The big players have a team on it. You have three tabs open in Excel. That ends here — AI agents that find it, gut the paperwork, and put you on the bid. While you sleep.

problem.title: The game was rigged to keep you out. It's working.

items.title: Buried across 27 countries
items.body: The tenders that fit you sit scattered on dozens of national portals, in languages you don't speak, in formats that fight back.

items.title: Drowning in paperwork
items.body: Specs, certificates, DGUE, deadlines. Miss one line and weeks of work hit the bin.

items.title: No bid office, no shot
items.body: The giants have a team for this. You have nights, weekends, and a spreadsheet. Guess who wins.

agents.title: Three agents. They don't miss, don't sleep, don't quit.

items.title: Find
items.body: They comb all 27 countries every day and surface only the tenders worth your time — matched to what you actually do.

items.title: Prepare
items.body: Requirements, certificates, DGUE, deadlines: extracted, cross-checked, assembled. The paperwork that broke you, handled.

items.title: Win
items.body: They turn the spec into a winning strategy, so you walk in with the same firepower as the giants.

audience.title: One of these is you. You already know which.

items.title: You run the bids
items.body: Midnight, another DGUE by hand. Hand the documents to the agents. Spend your hours on the offer that actually wins.

items.title: You own the number
items.body: Your bid team is the bottleneck on public growth. More tenders, same headcount — that's not a feature, it's a change of scale. With the numbers to prove it to the board.

items.title: You multiply across clients
items.body: Every client is a different world, and every saved hour is one more client you can take. Separate workspaces, clean data per client, your margin.

assurance.title: Ask the questions that usually kill the deal.

items.title: “Does my data train your AI?”
items.body: No. Your specs, your price lists, your bids stay yours. Never fed to anyone's model.

items.title: “Will it just make things up?”
items.body: It reads the actual tender and cites the page. Every requirement traces back to the document — no invented specs.

items.title: “Is each client's data really separate?”
items.body: Walled-off workspaces per client. What's theirs stays theirs. Nothing leaks across accounts.

items.title: “Does it fit what I already use?”
items.body: It slots into your stack. It doesn't ask you to throw anything out.

vision.title: Public money sits behind a velvet rope. We're cutting it.
vision.body: Hundreds of billions move through European public procurement every year — and stay out of reach for anyone without the time, the languages, or a bid office. AI agents change the math. Every SME gets a real shot.
vision.note: We're building. Your country is next.

coverage.title: 27 countries. We're taking them one by one.
coverage.body: We're rolling out across the European Union, market by market. Every flag lights up the day your country goes live.
coverage.note: Coverage is rolling out across all 27 EU countries.

cta.title: Your agents are ready. The only thing missing is you.
cta.body: We're switching on the EU market by market. Join the waitlist — the moment your country lights up, your agents start hunting.
